'''Improcco Company''' was a [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] led by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] [[Gett]]. It was based out of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[Fearless]]''. During the [[Skirmish at Dinlo]], Improcco Company extracted the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]]' [[Sarlacc Battalion A|Sarlacc Battalions A]] and [[Sarlacc Battalion B|B]], saving 1,058 [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] in the process.<ref name="Triple Zero" />

Improcco Company assisted anti-terror ops on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by being placed on leave, and providing [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta]] and [[Omega Squad|Omega]] cover so the squads could conduct crucial surveillance. However, [[Kal Skirata]] noted that the men of Improcco Company did not seem to enjoy their leave. This was attributed to clone troopers having little freedom and few modes of entertainment, and thus were not used to the new found liberty.<ref name="Triple Zero" />
